1. Executive Summary
The AskYourPdf (LIG-Team Chatbot) is a highly specialized, premium workspace environment designed to revolutionize the way users interact with complex documents.

emium workspace environment designed to revolutionize the way users interact with complex documents. By bridging high-
performance Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) backend algorithms with an ultra-
premium, interactive React-based frontend, the platform transforms static files (PDF, DOCX, TXT) into smart conversational nodes. This report outlines the full-stack software engineering, database integration, security systems, and UI/UX design implemented for the project.

e engineering, database integration, security systems, and UI/UX design implemented for the project. Built utilizing a modern stack composed of React 19, Vite, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS v4, FastAPI (Python), and MongoDB, the application is optimized for visual excellence, micro-interactions, and secure state management.

the application is optimized for visual excellence, micro-interactions, and secure state management. Key accomplishments include a dynamic 10-theme color engine, a 7-font global typography switcher, an advanced user authentication platform supporting secure HttpOnly cookie tokens, persistent multi-session chat workspaces, and a premium 3D particle simulation field using Three.js (React Three Fiber). 2.

n chat workspaces, and a premium 3D particle simulation field using Three.js (React Three Fiber). 2. Introduction & Project Context
Problem Statement
In academic, legal, and corporate environments, extracting specific information from extensive documents (such as textbooks, contracts, and research papers) is notoriously time-consuming.

tensive documents (such as textbooks, contracts, and research papers) is notoriously time-consuming. Classic keyword searches fail to capture context, while general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs) suffer from hallucinations and lack knowledge of private files. Objectives
To address these issues, the LIG-Team Chatbot provides an isolated, intelligence-scoped workspace that:
1. Allows users to securely upload private documents up to 10MB. 2.

elligence-scoped workspace that:
1. Allows users to securely upload private documents up to 10MB. 2. Generates localized vector embeddings to allow semantic, context-aware querying. 3. Synthesizes precise answers sourced strictly from the uploaded material (RAG). 4. Engages the user in an ultra-modern, beautiful workspace that maintains visual appeal, high readability, and fluid transitions to maximize productivity.

pace that maintains visual appeal, high readability, and fluid transitions to maximize productivity. Collaboration Scope & Detailed Division of Labor
The engineering distribution for this project was clearly structured. Mohamed Islem spearheaded the complete application design, the entire frontend workspace, client-side security flows, and the bulk of the FastAPI backend server infrastructure (including databases, security schemas, user sessions, cookie transactions, and CRUD systems).

cture (including databases, security schemas, user sessions, cookie transactions, and CRUD systems). Ahmed engineered the core backend text ingestion pipeline, vector indices, and natural language question-and-answer search. •
Mohamed Islem (Lead Software Architect):
•
Frontend UI/UX Architecture: Designed the entire client workspace, layout grids, settings panel, dynamic theme engine (10 themes), and global typography selectors (7 fonts).

grids, settings panel, dynamic theme engine (10 themes), and global typography selectors (7 fonts). •
Interactive Visuals: Engineered the 3D particle WebGL field using Three.js / React Three Fiber (Antigravity.jsx), GSAP ScrollTrigger transitions, smooth inertia scrolling with Lenis, and custom cursor click sparks. •
Backend Server Infrastructure: Designed and programmed the main FastAPI application (server.py), logging setups, and middleware CORS configurations.

rammed the main FastAPI application (server.py), logging setups, and middleware CORS configurations. •
Database Engineering (MongoDB): Developed the entire MongoDB connector schema, integrating active dynamic databases to model user credentials, chat histories, active chat rooms, and public discussion comments.

abases to model user credentials, chat histories, active chat rooms, and public discussion comments. •
Security & User Authentication: Developed the end-to-end security framework including bcrypt password hashing, JWT signature controls (src/auth.py), HTTP-Only session cookies parsing/issuance middleware, token refresh handlers (/refresh), and user registration, login, and logout endpoints.

e middleware, token refresh handlers (/refresh), and user registration, login, and logout endpoints. •
State & Networking Orchestration: Standardized client-side state hooks via Redux Toolkit and managed parallel server state queries through RTK Query, implementing automatic re-authentication interceptors. •
Client/Server CRUD Systems: Programmed controllers for file retrieval APIs, chat session list generation, starring features, and clean document purging routines.

etrieval APIs, chat session list generation, starring features, and clean document purging routines. •
Ahmed (Backend AI Core Developer):
•
Document Processing Pipeline: Structured standard file extraction for DOCX, TXT, and PDF documents using libraries like PyMuPDF (fitz), PDFMiner, and pytesseract OCR parsing.

, TXT, and PDF documents using libraries like PyMuPDF (fitz), PDFMiner, and pytesseract OCR parsing. •
Vector DB & Index Ingestion (ingest.py, pipeline.py): Configured sentence transformer bindings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) to map text chunks into high-density 384-dimensional mathematical arrays and integrated local FAISS indexes. •
Q&A Generative Logic (chatbot.py): Programmed search similarity algorithms and wired LLM completion APIs to formulate answers derived from context. 3.

ch similarity algorithms and wired LLM completion APIs to formulate answers derived from context. 3. Dynamic Premium Design System (Frontend)
One of the defining aspects of the AskYourPdf frontend is its commitment to visual elegance. Instead of creating a static dashboard, the workspace is treated as an active, customizable canvas designed to match the user's focus, ambient lighting, or device hardware.

ctive, customizable canvas designed to match the user's focus, ambient lighting, or device hardware. 🎨 The 10-Theme Color Engine
The system implements a premium CSS Custom Property override system, enabling users to swap the entire layout palette with a single click.

stom Property override system, enabling users to swap the entire layout palette with a single click. Theme Identifier
Name
Description

indigo (Default)

✍️
To enhance readability and provide personalization, a typography engine dynamically injects font family declarations across all parent DOM trees:
1.

on, a typography engine dynamically injects font family declarations across all parent DOM trees:
1. Outfit (Default): Clean, modern, and extremely friendly geometric sans-serif. 2. Inter: The absolute industry standard of crisp, high-legibility UI design. 3. Plus Jakarta Sans: A wide, expansive, premium corporate look. 4. Space Grotesk: A tech-forward, futuristic developer-oriented geometric face. 5. DM Sans: Highly minimal, lightweight, and modern aesthetic. 6.

developer-oriented geometric face. 5. DM Sans: Highly minimal, lightweight, and modern aesthetic. 6. JetBrains Mono: Tech/hacker aesthetic providing monospace focus. 7. Playfair Display: High-end luxury serif for a sophisticated, editorial vibe. ✨ Interactive Micro-Animations & 3D WebGL Features
•
Three.js / React Three Fiber (Antigravity.jsx): Renders a high-performance 3D particle field under the landing page.

Three Fiber (Antigravity.jsx): Renders a high-performance 3D particle field under the landing page. Particles are affected by mouse magnetism, shifting coordinates dynamically in real-time. If the mouse is idle, an automatic sinusoidal mathematical wave animates the vector particles. •
GSAP & ScrollTrigger: Implements scroll-driven layout reveals. Landing page panels glide, rotate, and scale based on active scrolling indices.

iven layout reveals. Landing page panels glide, rotate, and scale based on active scrolling indices. •
Lenis Smooth Scrolling: Eliminates browser-native jumpy scrolling, wrapping inputs in a beautiful physical inertia engine. •
Custom UI Sprites:
•
ClickSpark: Emit geometric light bursts at click coordinates. •
LightRays: Multi-angle dynamic light beams forming a futuristic background halo. •
LetterGlitch: Retro cyberpunk terminal text scramble interactions.

g a futuristic background halo. •
LetterGlitch: Retro cyberpunk terminal text scramble interactions. •
RotatingText & ScrollFloat: Liquid-smooth text transitions. 4. Backend System Engineering & Database Schema
Engineered and Developed by Mohamed Islem
The backend core of the application utilizes FastAPI (Python), chosen for its asynchronous capability, automated API documentation (Swagger), and extreme processing speed.

or its asynchronous capability, automated API documentation (Swagger), and extreme processing speed. The server is structured around clean REST endpoints communicating with a local MongoDB database cluster to orchestrate system configurations. MongoDB Integration & Document Collections
🗄️
The database holds persistent workspace files, structured around four primary collections:
1. users: Models user credentials and profiles.

at"}], "timestamp": "datetime"
}
4. comments: Tracks posts published on the public discussion board. { "_id": "ObjectId", "username": "string", "text": "string", "timestamp": "datetime"
}
🔐 OAuth2 & JWT Security Infrastructure
Session safety is constructed utilizing cryptographic signatures and strict cookie restrictions:
•
Password Hashing: Passwords are cryptographically salted and hashed using bcrypt via the passlib library before DB insertion.

ds are cryptographically salted and hashed using bcrypt via the passlib library before DB insertion. •
Double-Token Generation: Valid logins generate both a short-term Access Token (expires in 15 minutes) and a long-term Refresh Token (expires in 7 days) signed via HMAC-
SHA256 (JWT). •
HttpOnly Cookies Transmission: To mitigate Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) risks, tokens are never exposed to browser javascript.

ssion: To mitigate Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) risks, tokens are never exposed to browser javascript. Instead, they are returned in HTTP headers via Set-
Cookie labeled as httponly=True, samesite="lax", and path="/". •
Guard Middleware: Custom Dependency injections (get_current_user) intercept active routers, extract cookie parameters, decode JWT headers, validate username signatures, and raise standard 401 exceptions if credentials are missing or expired.

lidate username signatures, and raise standard 401 exceptions if credentials are missing or expired. 📂 File Management & I/O Controllers
To avoid server disk clutter, file management modules utilize logical database constraints:
•
Limits Validation: Prior to accepting file uploads, the server queries the database count of active workspaces, enforcing a maximum limit of 10 file upload nodes per user.

the database count of active workspaces, enforcing a maximum limit of 10 file upload nodes per user. •
I/O Storage Scoping: Document uploads are partitioned cleanly by username on the storage disk (data/user_files/{username}/{filename}). •
CRUD Deletion Integrity: Triggering a chat deletion safely drops the corresponding session mapping, flushes the chronological message history, removes the physical file from the storage directory, and rebuilds the localized vector database indexes.

es the physical file from the storage directory, and rebuilds the localized vector database indexes. •
Binary Delivery Interfaces: Dynamic endpoint APIs (GET /user-files/{filename}/view) read raw PDF documents directly into stream outputs, converting raw texts or DOCX layouts into optimized inline HTML wrappers.

ectly into stream outputs, converting raw texts or DOCX layouts into optimized inline HTML wrappers. 💬 Community Boards & Social Features
To foster cooperation, a global Comments Section allows active users to share notes:
•
Users can fetch (GET /comments) or publish (POST /comments) message packets. •
Security guards ensure users can only delete comments matching their active username (DELETE /comments/{comment_id}). 5.

re users can only delete comments matching their active username (DELETE /comments/{comment_id}). 5. AI Core: Document Ingestion, Vectors & RAG
Engineered and Developed by Ahmed
The AI processing segment focuses on turning static, text-heavy documents into searchable data nodes by generating local vector embeddings and applying semantic retrieval strategies. 📝 Multi-Format Text Extraction & Parsing
•
Handles diverse formats including PDFs, DOCX, and TXT files.

ulti-Format Text Extraction & Parsing
•
Handles diverse formats including PDFs, DOCX, and TXT files. •
Uses PyMuPDF (fitz) and PDFMiner to extract raw text blocks while maintaining structural readability. •
Integrates Tesseract OCR capabilities via the pytesseract library, allowing the parser to extract and read embedded text inside images and scanned pages within documents.

owing the parser to extract and read embedded text inside images and scanned pages within documents. 📂 Vector Database Indexing (FAISS)
•
Text Chunking: Extracted texts are split into readable chunks using logical character offsets to maintain local semantic context. •
Mathematical Encoding: Chunks are translated into high-dimensional vector spaces using the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model from the sentence-transformers library, which maps texts into 384-dimensional mathematical arrays.

l from the sentence-transformers library, which maps texts into 384-dimensional mathematical arrays. •
FAISS Storage Index: Indexes are stored in secure local partitions (data/user_vector_db/{username}). Chunks are indexed inside FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) matrices. 💬 Contextual Prompt Synthesis & LLM Integrations
•
Semantic Matching: When a user queries the bot, the query is mapped to the same 384-
dimensional vector space.

atching: When a user queries the bot, the query is mapped to the same 384-
dimensional vector space. Chunks showing high cosine similarity are fetched from the local FAISS index. •
Context-Injected Prompts: Top matching text chunks are formatted alongside prompt templates, instructing the generative model to answer strictly using the provided context. •
LLM API Integration: Prompts are sent to generative models (e.g.

ictly using the provided context. •
LLM API Integration: Prompts are sent to generative models (e.g. OpenAI completions) to produce accurate, context-aware answers, return citation filenames, and compute similarity scores. 6.

roduce accurate, context-aware answers, return citation filenames, and compute similarity scores. 6. Functional Architecture & Core Workspace Features
graph TD User([User Client]) -->|Interacts & Logs In| UI[React Frontend Workspace] UI -->|Cookie Credentials / JWT| RTK[Redux RTK Query] RTK -->|JWT Credentials / HttpOnly| BE[FastAPI Backend - Port 8000] subgraph Frontend Components [Developed by Mohamed Islem] UI --> Home[Home / Landing Page] UI --> AuthForms[Login, Register & Logout Routes] UI --> ChatWorkspace[Chat / Active Workspace] ChatWorkspace --> DocPreview[Live Document Preview] ChatWorkspace --> ChatWindow[Active Chat Thread] ChatWorkspace --> Customizer[Theme & Font Customizer] end subgraph Backend Routing & DB [Developed by Mohamed Islem] BE --> AuthRouter[Auth, Cookie & Refresh Middleware] BE --> CRUD[Sessions, Stars, Files, & Forums CRUD APIs] CRUD --> Mongo[(MongoDB Server Database)] end subgraph Backend AI RAG Core [Developed by Ahmed] BE --> IngestPipeline[Doc Parser, Chunking & OCR Ingestion] BE --> QueryRouter[Retrieval-Augmented Generator Q&A Core] IngestPipeline -->|384 Dimensions| FAISS[(FAISS Vector Storage)] QueryRouter -->|Cosine Semantic Search| FAISS QueryRouter -->|Augmented Prompt Context| LLM[LLM Generation Engine] end
1.

e Semantic Search| FAISS QueryRouter -->|Augmented Prompt Context| LLM[LLM Generation Engine] end
1. Premium Chat Workspace (Chat.jsx)
The core workspace is divided into an ergonomic multi-panel grid system:
•
Left Control Panel: Handles session lists (showing uploaded documents). Starred chats are grouped at the top, and current document storage constraints are animated with slot-tracking bars (e.g., maximum 10 documents limit).

ocument storage constraints are animated with slot-tracking bars (e.g., maximum 10 documents limit). •
Workspace Settings: Houses the real-time Theme and Font switchers, plus database update controllers. •
Document Hub / Steppers: Houses quick-start visual guides and embedded video tutorials with custom-built media player controls. 2.

s quick-start visual guides and embedded video tutorials with custom-built media player controls. 2. Interactive Document Preview & Citation Panel
To prevent workspace fragmentation, an inline visualizer utilizes an iframe sandbox to view documents natively on the left side of the screen. Users can pop out the viewer to a new tab or reference active text side-by-side with chat inputs.

n. Users can pop out the viewer to a new tab or reference active text side-by-side with chat inputs. When responses are output, precise details (similarity percentages and source filenames) appear in custom citation nodes. 3. Drag-and-Drop Session Management (Chatbot.jsx)
Uploading a document is fully intuitive:
•
Entering drag states overlays an active backdrop glow. •
Dropping a valid document immediately communicates with the backend ingestion endpoint (/chat-sessions).

ping a valid document immediately communicates with the backend ingestion endpoint (/chat-sessions). •
The document is parsed, indexed, and a new persistent session is added to the sidebar. 7. State Management & Network Synchronization
Engineered and Developed by Mohamed Islem
To keep complex client panels synced with backend database endpoints, the application implements a unified state management layer on the client side.

database endpoints, the application implements a unified state management layer on the client side. Redux Toolkit Global Client State
📦
•
User Session Sync (authSlice.jsx): Parses user details directly from cookies. Reducers manage authentication states, updating cookie records upon successful registration or login, and purging them on logout. •
Layout & Workspace States: Coordinates global settings, sidebar states, active chat references, and custom typography/theme selections.

tes global settings, sidebar states, active chat references, and custom typography/theme selections. 🔄 RTK Query Network Layer & Automatic Token Refresh
Network synchronization uses RTK Query to manage caching, request states, and server endpoints:
•
Base API Injection: apiSlice.jsx injects endpoints across the workspace (e.g., /auth, /register, /chat-sessions, /comments), avoiding repetitive backend query configurations.

.g., /auth, /register, /chat-sessions, /comments), avoiding repetitive backend query configurations. •
Asynchronous Token Interceptor: Coordinates the re-authentication sequence: [Server Returns 401 / 403 (Token Expired)] │ ▼ [Intercept Request in apiSlice] │ ▼ [Send Asynchronous POST to /refresh] │ ┌───────────┴───────────┐ ▼ (Success) ▼ (Failure) [Save New Access Cookie] [Dispatch Logout State] │ │ ▼ ▼ [Retry Original Request] [Redirect to Landing Page]
8.

ccess Cookie] [Dispatch Logout State] │ │ ▼ ▼ [Retry Original Request] [Redirect to Landing Page]

9. System Workflow & Architecture Diagrams
During active sessions, client interactions execute clean transactional pipelines:
[User Type Question] │ ▼
[React Chat Feature (Chatbot.jsx)] │ ▼ (Sends HTTP POST to /query)
[FastAPI Backend - Route: /query] │ ├─► [Query FAISS Vector Store for Similar Document Chunks] │ ├─► [Retrieve Top-K Matching Text Chunks] │ └─► [Pass Prompt to LLM Generation Engine] │ ▼ (Synthesizes Answer + Computes Similarity Scores)
[FastAPI Returns JSON Payload] │ ▼
[React UI Updates Message Feed] - Smooth animation injection - Bullet-proof citation tabs displaying document sources & similarity metrics (%)

tion injection - Bullet-proof citation tabs displaying document sources & similarity metrics (%)
10. Setup, Installation & Deployment Guide
Prerequisites
•
Python: version 3.10.0 or higher. •
MongoDB: Local community server active on mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017. •
Node.js & npm: Node version 18.0.0+ / npm version 9.0.0+. 1. Backend Ingestion Server Setup
1. Navigate to the backend directory B:
cd B
2. Establish and launch a python virtual environment:
python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate
3.

B
2. Establish and launch a python virtual environment:
python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate
3. Install dependencies:
pip install -r requirements.txt
4. Run the FastAPI local server:
uvicorn server.py --reload --port 8000
2. Frontend Application Setup
1. Navigate to the frontend directory:
cd ../frontend
2. Install packages:
npm install
3. Launch the hot-reloading development server:
npm run dev

end

11. Conclusion & Future Outlook
The AskYourPdf Workspace delivers a high-performance, beautifully interactive, and context-
aware workspace.

ourPdf Workspace delivers a high-performance, beautifully interactive, and context-
aware workspace. Through the deployment of modern design elements (React 19, Redux, Tailwind v4, Three.js) and secure backend integrations (FastAPI, MongoDB, OAuth2, FAISS RAG), the project demonstrates that complex technical tools can be made highly accessible, transparent, and aesthetically pleasing. Key Milestones Achieved:
1.

can be made highly accessible, transparent, and aesthetically pleasing. Key Milestones Achieved:
1. Lead Architecture Coordination: Successful deployment of fully modular full-stack client-server structures. 2. Robust Backend Integrity: Secure implementation of MongoDB collections, session cookies validation middleware, security handshakes, and public social comment threads. 3. Dynamic Customization Canvas: Customizers supporting 10 color settings and 7 typographic options to boost productivity.

on Canvas: Customizers supporting 10 color settings and 7 typographic options to boost productivity. 4. Premium WebGL Aesthetics: Smooth 3D particle canvas renders improving user interaction. Full-Stack Architecture, Interactive UI/UX, Security Systems, & Database Integrations engineered by Mohamed Islem. Document Processing Pipeline, FAISS Vector Indexing, & AI Retrieval Logic developed by Ahmed.
